rule_metadata.author: Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Suspicious Impacket PSExec Temp Executable File Creation

rules.rule_text:
title: Suspicious Impacket PSExec Temp Executable File Creation
id: b0ceadcb-ebc8-455e-9541-19d90ad4502c
status: experimental
description: Detects PSExec.py (Impacket) suspicious .exe file creation in Windows
  directory.
references:
- https://github.com/fortra/impacket/blob/impacket_0_9_24/examples/psexec.py
- https://www.13cubed.com/downloads/impacket_exec_commands_cheat_sheet.pdf
author: Micah Babinski
date: 2023/01/08
tags:
- attack.s0357
- attack.execution
- attack.t1569
- attack.t1569.002
logsource:
  product: windows
  category: file_event
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: system
    TargetFilename|re: ^C:\\Windows\\[A-Za-z]{8}\.exe$
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: medium
